explanation: The user asks to go to the potato that is in the cabinet, which is identified as potato_1. I am currently holding potato_0, so I will keep holding it and move directly to potato_1. The old plan included going to cabinet_0 and picking up potato_1, but since the user specifically wants to go to the potato, the most direct action is to navigate to potato_1. Therefore, the plan is updated to simply go to potato_1.
